Because the sanitizer only validates the src attribute of ` ``` Although CSP is strict, CryptPad exposes several same-origin gadgets that can execute attacker-controlled code. For example, `jscolor.js` dynamically evaluates user-provided options: https://github.com/cryptpad/cryptpad/blob/0dd3c1f53d56dffb06651b86ead6b9b387920173/www/common/jscolor.js#L65-L71 ### Impact Sanitizer bypass, HTML injection and potentially XSS.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00242, "percentile": 0.15125}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-g2g4-47gv-p72v", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-26T19:05:10Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g2g4-47gv-p72v", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-g2g4-47gv-p72v"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-26028"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-20T20:16:36Z", "published_at": "2026-05-26T19:05:10Z", "references": ["https://github.com/cryptpad/cryptpad/security/advisories/GHSA-g2g4-47gv-p72v", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-26028", "https://github.com/cryptpad/cryptpad/releases/tag/2026.2.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g2g4-47gv-p72v"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/cryptpad/cryptpad/security-advisories/GHSA-g2g4-47gv-p72v", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/cryptpad/cryptpad", "summary": "CryptPad has a Sanitizer Bypass in Diffmarked.js that Allows Arbitrary HTML Injection and Potential XSS", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-26T19:05:11Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-g2g4-47gv-p72v", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "cryptpad"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 5.9.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
